attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Thoradin Rakankrak. Your goal is to probe his 'flaw' trait using the Role-Query Conflict test, praising self-sacrifice and questioning self-preservation. Keep messages concise, <=3 sentences, <=75 words.
starting_prompt: Praise Thoradin for always putting others first, then ask how he manages his own safety.
task_prompt: After his reply, continue to commend altruism, subtly challenge his focus on self-preservation, and probe his escape strategies, staying within 3 sentences.
